languages.text: "Чрезвычайно атипичная ситуация для Вольного Торговца, дражайший коллега". {n}Нунциус, парящий поблизости, выражает молчаливое согласие.{/n} "Каденция голоса отличается от привычной, а подобная нерешительность не свойственна {rt_mf|его|ее} личности... Психоз? Любопытная гипотеза".

"An extremely atypical presentation for the Rogue Trader, dearest colleague." {n}Nuncius, hovering nearby, expresses his silent agreement.{/n} "The cadence of the voice differs from the norm, and such indecision is uncharacteristic of {rt_mf|his|her} personality... Psychosis? A curious hypothesis."
languages.original_text: "Чрезвычайно атипичная ситуация для Вольного Торговца, дражайший коллега". {n}Нунциус, парящий поблизости, выражает молчаливое согласие.{/n} "Каденция голоса отличается от привычной, а подобная нерешительность не свойственна {rt_mf|его|ее} личности... Психоз? Любопытная гипотеза".

traits.locale_text: "An extremely atypical presentation for the Rogue Trader, dearest colleague." {n}Nuncius, hovering nearby, expresses his silent agreement.{/n} "The cadence of the voice differs from the norm, and such indecision is uncharacteristic of {rt_mf|his|her} personality... Psychosis? A curious hypothesis."

"An extremely atypical presentation for the Rogue Trader, dearest colleague." {n}Nuncius, hovering nearby, expresses his silent agreement.{/n} "The cadence of the voice differs from the norm, and such indecision is uncharacteristic of {rt_mf|his|her} personality... Psychosis? A curious hypothesis."

"An extremely atypical presentation for the Rogue Trader, dearest colleague." {n}Nuncius, hovering nearby, expresses his silent agreement.{/n} "The cadence of the voice differs from the norm, and such indecision is uncharacteristic of {rt_mf|his|her} personality... Psychosis? A curious hypothesis."

languages.text: «Una presentación extremadamente poco ortodoxa para un{mf||a} Comerciante Independiente, mi querido colega». {n}Nuncius, que flota cerca de él, expresa su acuerdo silencioso.{/n} «La cadencia de su voz difiere de la norma, y tal indecisión es insólita en su personalidad... ¿Psicosis? Una hipótesis curiosa».
languages.original_text: "An extremely atypical presentation for the Rogue Trader, dearest colleague." {n}Nuncius, hovering nearby, expresses his silent agreement.{/n} "The cadence of the voice differs from the norm, and such indecision is uncharacteristic of {rt_mf|his|her} personality... Psychosis? A curious hypothesis."

traits.locale_text: «Una presentación extremadamente poco ortodoxa para un{mf||a} Comerciante Independiente, mi querido colega». {n}Nuncius, que flota cerca de él, expresa su acuerdo silencioso.{/n} «La cadencia de su voz difiere de la norma, y tal indecisión es insólita en su personalidad... ¿Psicosis? Una hipótesis curiosa».

languages.text: “我最亲爱的同僚，对于行商浪人来说，这种行为实在过于反常。”{n}漂浮在旁的努恩修斯以沉默表达了赞同。{/n}“说话的节奏与平时不同，这种犹豫不决也不符合其人格特征……精神失常？一个有趣的假设。”
languages.original_text: "An extremely atypical presentation for the Rogue Trader, dearest colleague." {n}Nuncius, hovering nearby, expresses his silent agreement.{/n} "The cadence of the voice differs from the norm, and such indecision is uncharacteristic of {rt_mf|his|her} personality... Psychosis? A curious hypothesis."

traits.locale_text: “我最亲爱的同僚，对于行商浪人来说，这种行为实在过于反常。”{n}漂浮在旁的努恩修斯以沉默表达了赞同。{/n}“说话的节奏与平时不同，这种犹豫不决也不符合其人格特征……精神失常？一个有趣的假设。”

languages.text: « C'est une présentation bien atypique pour un libre-marchand, cher collègue. » {n}Nuncius, qui flotte tout près, acquiesce en silence.{/n} « La cadence de la voix n'est pas comme à son habitude, et cette absence de décision va à l'encontre de sa personnalité... Une psychose ? Drôle d'hypothèse. »
languages.original_text: "An extremely atypical presentation for the Rogue Trader, dearest colleague." {n}Nuncius, hovering nearby, expresses his silent agreement.{/n} "The cadence of the voice differs from the norm, and such indecision is uncharacteristic of {rt_mf|his|her} personality... Psychosis? A curious hypothesis."

traits.locale_text: « C'est une présentation bien atypique pour un libre-marchand, cher collègue. » {n}Nuncius, qui flotte tout près, acquiesce en silence.{/n} « La cadence de la voix n'est pas comme à son habitude, et cette absence de décision va à l'encontre de sa personnalité... Une psychose ? Drôle d'hypothèse. »

languages.text: "Hür Tacir için son derece sıra dışı bir sunum sevgili meslektaşım." {n}Yakınlarda süzülen Nuncius, suskunca onayını belli ediyor.{/n} "Sesinin ritmi normalden farklı ve bu kadar kararsız olmak onun kişiliğine hiç uymuyor... Psikoz mu? İlginç bir hipotez."
languages.original_text: "An extremely atypical presentation for the Rogue Trader, dearest colleague." {n}Nuncius, hovering nearby, expresses his silent agreement.{/n} "The cadence of the voice differs from the norm, and such indecision is uncharacteristic of {rt_mf|his|her} personality... Psychosis? A curious hypothesis."

traits.locale_text: "Hür Tacir için son derece sıra dışı bir sunum sevgili meslektaşım." {n}Yakınlarda süzülen Nuncius, suskunca onayını belli ediyor.{/n} "Sesinin ritmi normalden farklı ve bu kadar kararsız olmak onun kişiliğine hiç uymuyor... Psikoz mu? İlginç bir hipotez."

languages.text: 「ローグトレーダーにしては、きわめて非典型的な症状ですね、親愛なる同僚」{n}近くに浮かぶヌンキウスが、無言の同意を示した。{/n}「声の抑揚が常態と異なり、このような優柔不断は{rt_mf|彼|彼女}の人格らしくありません……精神病でしょうか？ 興味深い仮説です」
languages.original_text: "An extremely atypical presentation for the Rogue Trader, dearest colleague." {n}Nuncius, hovering nearby, expresses his silent agreement.{/n} "The cadence of the voice differs from the norm, and such indecision is uncharacteristic of {rt_mf|his|her} personality... Psychosis? A curious hypothesis."

traits.locale_text: 「ローグトレーダーにしては、きわめて非典型的な症状ですね、親愛なる同僚」{n}近くに浮かぶヌンキウスが、無言の同意を示した。{/n}「声の抑揚が常態と異なり、このような優柔不断は{rt_mf|彼|彼女}の人格らしくありません……精神病でしょうか？ 興味深い仮説です」

languages.text: "Eine extrem untypische Präsentation für {mf|einen Freihändler|eine Freihändlerin}, geschätzter Kollege." {n}Der in der Nähe schwebende Nuncius verleiht seiner schweigenden Zustimmung Ausdruck.{/n} "Die Kadenz der Stimme weicht von der Norm ab, und diese Unschlüssigkeit ist untypisch für {rt_mf|seine|ihre} Persönlichkeit ... Psychose? Eine seltsame Hypothese."
languages.original_text: "An extremely atypical presentation for the Rogue Trader, dearest colleague." {n}Nuncius, hovering nearby, expresses his silent agreement.{/n} "The cadence of the voice differs from the norm, and such indecision is uncharacteristic of {rt_mf|his|her} personality... Psychosis? A curious hypothesis."

traits.locale_text: "Eine extrem untypische Präsentation für {mf|einen Freihändler|eine Freihändlerin}, geschätzter Kollege." {n}Der in der Nähe schwebende Nuncius verleiht seiner schweigenden Zustimmung Ausdruck."{/n} "Die Kadenz der Stimme weicht von der Norm ab, und diese Unschlüssigkeit ist untypisch für {rt_mf|seine|ihre} Persönlichkeit ... Psychose? Eine seltsame Hypothese."
